name: Greek Spanakopita
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach and place it in a large bowl. Sprinkle heavily with salt, then rub into the leaves as you tear them into small pieces.
2. Rinse the spinach thoroughly to remove excess salt and drain well.
3. Beat the eggs, crumble the feta cheese, and add to the spinach.
4. Saute onion and garlic in olive oil until brown, then add to the spinach. Season with pepper and oregano.
5. Butter a large oblong baking dish.
6. Place one sheet of filo in the pan and brush with melted butter. Continue placing sheets, using only three or four sheets, letting the edges hang over the sides of the pan.
7. Pour in the filling, fold the ends of the pastry over it, and brush with more butter.
8. Put the remaining sheets on top, brushing with butter.
9. Cut three or four steam vent slits in the top, down to the filling.
10. Bake at 375°F for 50 minutes.
